verse_text: So Pharaoh commanded all his people, saying, 'Every male born to the Hebrews you shall cast into the river, but every female you shall save alive.'

links.context: Pharaoh's order to destroy the Hebrew babies ([[EXO.1:22]]) prefigured Herod's attempt to kill Christ by destroying all the infants in Bethlehem ([[MAT.2:16]]). As Moses was preserved from death in order to deliver Israel from bondage, so also Christ was preserved in order to save the world through His Passion and Resurrection.
The cruelty of Herod was prefigured by Pharaoh, who, in an attempt to destroy the power of Israel, commanded the death of all the newborn Jewish boys ([[EXO.1:16]], [[EXO.1:22]]).
